# format: html5-dompatch-v2
# status: active

Batch index=0 size=23
CreateDocument key=1 doctype=<none>
CreateElement key=2 ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=3
CreateElement key=4 ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=4
CreateElement key=5 ns=svg local="svg" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=4 child=5
CreateElement key=6 ns=svg local="foreignObject" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=5 child=6
CreateElement key=7 ns=html local="div" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=6 child=7
CreateText key=8 text="x"
AppendChild parent=7 child=8
CreateElement key=9 ns=mathml local="math" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=4 child=9
CreateElement key=10 ns=mathml local="annotation-xml" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="encoding" value="application/xhtml+xml"}]
AppendChild parent=9 child=10
CreateElement key=11 ns=html local="span" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=10 child=11
CreateText key=12 text="y"
AppendChild parent=11 child=12
